## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's business progress, customer retention, product development, and fundraising efforts with ICONIQ Capital.](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has evolved its customer onboarding process to a highly effective 8-week strategy sprint, resulting in 100% conversion and increased customer satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [The company is developing a free AI visibility tool to be launched in October, aiming to disrupt the market and acquire customers efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [GrowthX has successfully transitioned off Aeros, building its own workflow platform with improved scalability and maintainability](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=3054.0)
  - [The company is currently raising a Series B round, with multiple investors showing strong interest](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=4057.0)

## Topics

### Customer Retention and ICP Refinement

  - [Initial challenges with customer fit and retention due to misaligned expectations and unclear ICP](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Implemented an 8-week strategy sprint to replace 90-day pilots, resulting in 100% conversion rate and increased upsells](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Developed a complex ICP matrix considering factors like budget, content needs, and decision-making capacity](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Focusing on customers with the right profile has led to improved retention and expansion](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)

### Product Development and Platform Evolution

  - [Transitioned from Aeros to a custom-built workflow platform using Temporal runtime](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=3054.0)
  - [New platform offers improved scalability, maintainability, and cost-efficiency (saving potentially millions in Aeros fees)](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=3267.0)
  - [Developing an AI visibility tool (similar to Crunchbase for AI/SEO) to be launched in October](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Considering open-sourcing parts of their framework and monetizing the ecosystem around it](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=3511.0)

### Market Positioning and Competitive Landscape

  - [Differentiating from competitors like Fathom and Sprout by focusing on context and quality in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2420.0)
  - [Addressing the limitations of pure AI-generated content by combining expert-led strategies with AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=2506.0)
  - [Disrupting traditional agency models by offering higher quality, faster delivery, and more consistent results](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=3646.0)

### Fundraising and Future Growth

  - [Currently raising a Series B round with strong investor interest](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=4057.0)
  - [Focusing on finding the right partner who understands the unique business model and long-term vision](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=4142.0)
  - [Balancing fundraising efforts with maintaining business growth and customer focus](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=4172.0)
  - [Exploring adjacent services and use cases (e.g., e-commerce catalog management) for future expansion](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=3978.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Launch the AI visibility tool in October as planned](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Continue engaging with potential investors for the Series B round](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=4057.0)
  - [Follow up with ICONIQ Capital regarding next steps in the investment process](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=4224.0)
  - [Maintain focus on customer acquisition and expansion while managing fundraising efforts](https://fathom.video/share/R_xax3szfgW-EJ7sCYLFgPeQCirUaq_P?tab=summary&timestamp=4234.0)
